investigation_method: Analyzed 69-entry post-log.json + Pinterest v5 API + draft creation timeline

breakdown.detail: Failed before any image upload — no content reached Pinterest. No drafts created.
Never reached the pin editor UI.
Image uploaded (step 1), browser crashed during title/link entry (step 2). If Pinterest auto-saves after image upload, drafts may exist. From May 25.

cleanup_options.api_method: NOT AVAILABLE — Pinterest v5 REST API has no drafts endpoint. Drafts are web-only.
cleanup_options.bulk_method: NOT AVAILABLE — Pinterest has no bulk draft management page.

manual_method.risk_to_live_pins: NONE — drafts appear as unpublished cards on the pin-builder page, visually distinct from live pins. Live pins are never shown on the pin-builder/drafts page.
steps: 5. Repeat for each draft (must be one at a time)

risky_methods_to_avoid: CloakBrowser headless — reCAPTCHA triggers, account risk
Bulk delete scripts — these target LIVE pins, not drafts
Any API delete calls — also target live pins

recommendation: SAFE TO LEAVE. Only 0-2 drafts maximum, no urgent action needed. If Qasem wants them cleaned up, 2-minute manual task via real browser at https://www.pinterest.com/qfinhub/pin-builder/.
action_taken: NONE — drafts left in place. No risk to live pins.
